section_miscategorizations.text: White blood cell count was elevated at 23,000 in the emergency department.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This lab value is described as part of the prior ED visit course rather than as a current objective result from today's encounter. While it is an objective datum, in this context it functions more as historical information about the recent hospitalization than as a current finding, so it fits slightly better in HPI. However, its placement in Findings is not seriously misleading.
